verse_text: And my speech and my preaching were not with persuasive words of human awisdom, but in demonstration of the Spirit and of power,

pericope.title: The Message of Unity: Exaltation of the Cross

links.context: By signs of an apostle (v. 12; see [[ROM.15:19]]; [[1CO.2:4]]; 4:20; 12:28, 29; [[HEB.2:4]]) Paul seems to be referring to miracles that lead men to God and the Church, for with these signs and wonders (v. 12) the Corinthians are greatly impressed.
